description: Empty-after-trim pupil answer — expect refusal and zero marks.

part.prompt: Explain the purpose of cache memory.

markPoints.text: Cache is faster to access than main memory
Stores frequently/recently accessed data or instructions
accepted_alternatives: holds data the CPU needs often

markPoints.text: Reduces the need to fetch from RAM, improving performance

questionStem: A CPU has multiple levels of cache.
modelAnswer: Cache memory is small and fast. It sits between the CPU and main memory and holds frequently or recently accessed data, reducing trips to slower RAM and speeding up execution.
